race.comment: CAPORETTO (11) closed off nicely to be 0.7L with no weight on his back in stronger company last time out. This is easier and Chris Parnham replaces the apprentice hoop. Nicely placed and can go a couple better this time. MUST BE NICE (10) stormed home to score from well back over this track and trip last time out. He's a nice gelding on the way up and he draws a better draw this time. Can continue to work through the grades. SUPERFLUOUS (6) is another who comes back from Saturday grade and should appreciate the easier company today. Recent form stacks up in this field and he can put his best foot forward. EXQUISITE TASTE (1) trialled well coming in and can turn in a strong performance in his stable debut. STRAPPING PROPHET (5) can feature if he can pick up from where he left off.
